import sys

from backend.ai_engine.prompt_generator import PromptGenerator
pg = PromptGenerator\(\)
# 测试生成prompt是否报错
try:
    prompt = pg.generate_batch_modular_prompt\(
        source_structure={''files'': {}}, 
        expected_structure={''files'': {}}, 
        rules_content=''test'', 
        modules=[], 
        output_filename=''test.xlsx''
    \)
    print\(''Prompt generated successfully, length:'', len\(prompt\)\)
    # 检查是否包含依赖列
    if ''依赖列'' in prompt:
        print\(''WARNING: 依赖列 found in prompt!''\)
    else:
        print\(''No 依赖列 in prompt''\)
except Exception as e:
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
    print\(''Error:'', e\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl

# 检查最新的输出文件
file_path = r''e:\\project\\DataMerge\\tenants\\rex\\calculations\\batch_1769938251_7690\\output\\薪资汇总表.xlsx''

# 读取公式
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(file_path\)
ws = wb.active

print\(''=== 表头备注检查 ===''\)
for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
    cell = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col\)
    print\(f''{cell.value}: 备注={cell.comment}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''=== 第2行公式检查 ===''\)
for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
    cell = ws.cell\(row=2, column=col\)
    value = cell.value
    is_formula = str\(value\).startswith\(''=''\) if value else False
    print\(f''{ws.cell\(row=1, column=col\).value}: 值={value}, 是公式={is_formula}''\)

wb.close\(\)
")
